name: Quickie Mix Brownie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a 9x9x2-inch baking pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Combine Quickie Mix brown sugar, cocoa and walnuts in a medium-size bowl.
4. Beat vegetable oil and eggs slightly in a small bowl; stir into dry mixture.
5. Spread evenly in prepared pan.
6. Bake in 350°F oven for 25 minutes.
7. Cool in pan on wire rack.
8. Cut into 16 squares while still warm.
